description_long: This object consists of a row of modern, boxy houses arranged along a narrow, elongated green strip that resembles a shared driveway or pathway. The houses feature flat roofs, large windows, and minimalistic facades, with some units having small balconies or terraces. The exterior walls are primarily light gray and white, with occasional darker accents and touches of greenery from small trees and shrubs. The arrangement suggests a planned residential development, possibly townhouses or duplexes, with each unit having its own entrance and private outdoor space. The landscaping is simple, with grass strips and a few scattered trees providing a clean, organized look. The overall design emphasizes geometric forms, open sightlines, and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A row of modern, flat-roofed houses with large windows and minimalistic facades, arranged along a narrow green pathway. The design is clean, geometric, and contemporary, with light-colored exteriors and sparse landscaping.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the houses from the end of the green pathway, highlighting the linear arrangement and the front facades of the nearest units, with visible balconies and a tree.
description_view_1: View 1 provides a side perspective, revealing the staggered placement of the houses, the flat roofs, and the distribution of windows and outdoor spaces.
description_view_2: View 2 looks from the opposite end of the pathway, focusing on the rear facades and backyards of the houses, with less detail on entryways.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the houses from the back, emphasizing the rear walls, flat roofs, and the overall blocky structure of the development.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some floor-to-ceiling panels
attribute_entryway_design: Simple recessed doorways, some with small steps or porches, minimal overhangs, and clean lines
